name: set_system_jitter
full_help:
set_system_jitter

Description: 
Set system jitter

Syntax: 
set_system_jitter  [-quiet] [-verbose] <system_jitter>

Returns: 
system_jitter

Usage: 
  Name             Description
  ----------------------------
  [-quiet]         Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]       Suspend message limits during command execution
  <system_jitter>  System jitter: Value >= 0

Categories: 
XDC

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
